sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Federal judge voids HISA fee method in Churchill Downs case
feed.summary: A federal court in the Western District of Kentucky ruled that the Horseracing Integrity and Safety Authority’s (HISA) purse-weighted fee methodology is arbitrary, capricious, and unlawful. Churchill Downs (CHDN), the plaintiff, stated that this decision prevents HISA from collecting fees using this method and views it as a validation of their legal challenge. Churchill Downs CEO Bill Carstanjen criticized HISA's fiscal mismanagement and exceeding its authority.

feed.title: LW: Barclays Lowers Price Target on Lamb Weston Holdings | LW St
feed.summary: Barclays has maintained its Overweight rating on Lamb Weston Holdings (LW) but lowered its price target from $55.00 to $46.00. This adjustment aligns with a recent trend of downward price target revisions by several other analysts for the company. Despite these adjustments, analysts' consensus recommendation remains "Outperform" with an average target implying a significant upside from the current price.

feed.title: Top 3 Defensive Stocks That Could Lead To Your Biggest Gains This Month
feed.summary: This article identifies three "oversold" defensive stocks in the consumer staples sector—Dollar General (DG), J.M. Smucker (SJM), and Estée Lauder Companies (EL)—that present potential buying opportunities. These companies have Relative Strength Index (RSI) values near or below 30, indicating they may be undervalued. The report highlights recent price declines and analyst ratings for each stock.

feed.title: West Virginia American Water Announces $420,000 Infrastructure Project in North Charleston
feed.summary: West Virginia American Water has announced a $420,000 infrastructure upgrade project on 2nd Avenue in North Charleston, involving the replacement of 900 feet of aging pipe with a 6-inch PVC main. This project is part of a larger $129 million investment planned for infrastructure upgrades across the state in 2026, aimed at providing safe, clean, reliable, and affordable water to residents. Over the past decade, the company has invested over $805 million in infrastructure improvements.

feed.title: VeriSign (NASDAQ:VRSN) Price Target Raised to $295.00
feed.summary: Citigroup has raised its price target for VeriSign (NASDAQ:VRSN) to $295.00 from $280.00, maintaining a "buy" rating, which suggests a 13.9% upside. This adjustment follows VeriSign's recent quarterly earnings report where it missed EPS estimates but saw a 7.6% increase in revenue. Other analysts have also adjusted their ratings and price targets, with the company currently holding an average rating of "Moderate Buy."

feed.title: Royal Bank Of Canada Increases Atlas Energy Solutions (NYSE:AESI) Price Target to $13.00
feed.summary: Royal Bank of Canada has increased its price target for Atlas Energy Solutions (NYSE:AESI) to $13.00 from $12.00, maintaining a "sector perform" rating and implying a 3.75% potential upside. Despite this, analyst coverage for AESI is mixed-to-negative, with an average rating of "Reduce" and an average target price of $11.77. Insider selling has also been noted, with 238,912 shares sold in the last 90 days, though insiders still retain a significant ownership stake.

feed.title: Caesars Casino Bonus Code ROTOCASLAUNCH in April: Score $1k & 2.5K Rewards Credits
feed.summary: The Caesars Casino bonus code ROTOCASLAUNCH offers new players a welcome package including a $10 no-deposit bonus, a 100% deposit match up to $1,000, and 2,500 Caesars Rewards Credits. This promotion is available in Michigan, New Jersey, West Virginia, and Pennsylvania, with some terms varying by state. The article outlines how to claim the bonus, wagering requirements, and the benefits of the integrated Caesars Rewards program.

feed.title: Emerson Launches New, Easily Configurable Welding Platform
feed.summary: Emerson has introduced the new Branson Polaris Ultrasonic Welding Platform, designed to provide advanced manufacturing engineers with a flexible and scalable solution for joining various materials. This platform aims to enhance process efficiency and reliability for diverse applications, from automotive parts and medical devices to food packaging. It allows manufacturers to create custom welding systems that adapt to changing requirements and offers real-time control and secure connectivity for improved operational efficiency and validation in regulated environments.

feed.title: PPG develops new coating to cut glare for batters at PNC Park
feed.summary: PPG, a Pittsburgh-based manufacturer, has developed a new coating to reduce glare for batters at PNC Park. This innovation comes after Pittsburgh Pirates players reported difficulty tracking the ball during late-afternoon and evening games. The new coating was implemented during the off-season to specifically address this issue.

feed.title: Bank of America-Epstein Victims Deal Gets Preliminary Approval
feed.summary: A federal judge has granted preliminary approval to Bank of America Corp.'s $72.5 million settlement with a group of Jeffrey Epstein's victims. US District Judge Jed Rakoff made the decision, and victims will have a chance to object at a final settlement hearing scheduled for August 27.

feed.title: North Charleston gets 900 feet of new water main in $420K upgrade
feed.summary: West Virginia American Water has begun a $420,000 infrastructure upgrade in North Charleston, replacing 900 feet of old pipe with a new 6-inch PVC main. The project is expected to finish by the end of April, with final street restoration in spring 2026, and is part of a larger $129 million statewide investment plan for 2026. This upgrade aims to improve water service reliability for the community.

feed.title: Amazon To Rally Around 45%? Here Are 10 Top Analyst Forecasts For Thursday
feed.summary: This article details ten recent analyst rating changes and price target adjustments for major companies, including Amazon.com, Exelon, Methanex, ServiceNow, and Moderna. Wells Fargo raised its price target for Amazon, suggesting a potential rally, while other analysts issued both upgrades and downgrades for various stocks. The report provides a concise overview of how Wall Street experts are adjusting their outlooks for these top names.

feed.title: Should Blockbuster Earnings, AI Demand and Probe Settlement Require Action From Applied Materials (AMAT) Investors?
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) recently exceeded earnings expectations and provided strong guidance, driven by AI-fueled demand for advanced logic and high-bandwidth memory. The company also settled a Department of Commerce investigation, removing regulatory uncertainty. Investors should consider how these positive developments, combined with long-term customer commitments and AI infrastructure buildout, impact AMAT's investment narrative and risk-reward profile, while also being mindful of potential geopolitical tensions and supply chain disruptions.

feed.title: Dow's 125-point fall led by losses in Nike, Sherwin-Williams Co. stocks
feed.summary: The Dow Jones Industrial Average experienced a 125-point decline, primarily driven by significant losses in Nike and Sherwin-Williams Co. stock values. This downturn reflects immediate negative movements within key components of the Dow index.

feed.title: Critical flaw in F5 BIG-IP faces wide exploitation risk
feed.summary: A critical vulnerability in F5 BIG-IP Access Policy Manager (CVE-2025-53521) is under active exploitation, with F5 revising its assessment from a denial-of-service flaw to one that allows remote code execution. This change in severity, coupled with over 17,000 vulnerable IPs worldwide, has prompted CISA to add it to its Known Exploited Vulnerabilities catalog, urging federal agencies to remediate systems. Security experts warn of widespread exploitation and emphasize the need for immediate assessment and remediation by affected organizations.

feed.title: DTCR Stock Fund Price and Chart — NASDAQ:DTCR
feed.summary: The article provides a detailed overview of the DTCR Global X Data Center & Digital Infrastructure ETF, including its price, historical performance, key statistics like AUM and expense ratio, and investment strategy. It covers the fund's inception, management, and the type of companies it invests in, alongside technical analysis summaries and frequently asked questions about ETFs.

feed.title: Stifel Nicolaus Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ:JBHT) Stock
feed.summary: Stifel Nicolaus recently increased its price target for J.B. Hunt Transport Services (NASDAQ:JBHT) to $205 from $201, maintaining a "hold" rating. This move comes after the company reported an EPS beat of $1.90 on $3.10 billion in revenue, exceeding analyst estimates. Despite the increased price target, Stifel Nicolaus's forecast implies a slight downside from the current stock price, while the broader analyst consensus suggests a "Moderate Buy" with an average target of $205.45.

feed.title: This Akamai Technologies Analyst Is No Longer Bullish; Here Are Top 5 Downgrades For Thursday
feed.summary: Several Wall Street analysts have downgraded their ratings for five companies on Thursday. Baird analyst William Power downgraded Akamai Technologies (NASDAQ: AKAM) from Outperform to Neutral, maintaining a $110 price target. Other companies receiving downgrades include Dine Brands Global (NYSE: DIN), Centessa Pharmaceuticals (NASDAQ: CNTA), Methanex Corporation (NASDAQ: MEOH), and Expand Energy Corporation (NASDAQ: EXE).

feed.title: Should You Buy, Sell, or Hold Teradyne Stock After a 61% YTD Rise?
feed.summary: Teradyne (TER) shares have surged 61.3% year-to-date, outperforming its sector and peers, driven by strong AI-related demand and significant investments in cloud AI infrastructure. The company's semiconductor test revenue grew 45% year-over-year in Q4 2025, and it expects a 75% increase in Q1 2026 revenue, with AI applications projected to account for up to 70% of this growth. Despite trading at a premium valuation, Teradyne's diversified portfolio and consistent contribution to AI-driven technologies have earned it a Zacks Rank #1 (Strong Buy).

feed.title: Why Is United Airlines Stock Down Today? Crude Surge Weighs On UAL Shares
feed.summary: United Airlines Holdings stock is experiencing a downturn due to a sharp increase in crude oil prices, fueled by escalating tensions in Iran. This surge in jet fuel costs is expected to pressure airline margins, especially for United's extensive global network. Investors are looking towards the upcoming April 21 earnings report for the next major catalyst, despite analysts maintaining a bullish stance with a "Buy" rating.

feed.title: Oliver Lawrence T., RGC Resources senior VP, buys $200 in stock
feed.summary: Oliver Lawrence T., Senior VP and Secretary at RGC Resources Inc., recently purchased 9.238 shares of company stock for approximately $200. This transaction occurred on April 1, 2026, with the stock trading near its 52-week high, although analysis suggests it may be overvalued. RGC Resources also recently reported mixed Q1 2026 financial results, missing EPS but exceeding revenue forecasts, and declared its 328th consecutive quarterly dividend.

feed.title: Miles Christen Brooke, VP at Rgc Resources, buys $100 in Rgco stock
feed.summary: Miles Christen Brooke, VP of Human Resources at RGC Resources (RGCO), purchased 4.619 shares of common stock for $100 on April 1, 2026, at a price of $21.65 per share. This transaction increased her direct holdings to 9732.13 shares and was part of the company's Dividend Reinvestment and Stock Purchase Plan. RGC Resources recently reported Q1 2026 earnings per share of $0.47, missing analyst expectations, but exceeded revenue forecasts with $30.26 million and declared its 328th consecutive quarterly cash dividend of $0.2175 per share.

feed.title: T. Rowe Price, Loomis Are Buying MBS That Have Grown Cheap
feed.summary: Money managers like T. Rowe Price Group Inc. and Loomis Sayles & Co. are increasing their purchases of mortgage-backed securities (MBS) which have become cheaper due to market volatility. Spreads on current coupon MBS widened to 1.25 percentage points by March 31, up from 0.94 percentage points in late January, making them an attractive bargain for these firms. While all bonds weakened in March, mortgage bonds underperformed Treasuries, prompting these investment opportunities.

feed.title: Cummins India Ltd Stock: Key Insights into Operations, Growth Drivers, and Investor Considerations in India's Power Sector
feed.summary: Cummins India Ltd is a key player in India's engine and power generation sector, manufacturing diesel and natural gas engines and generator sets. As a subsidiary of Cummins Inc., the company benefits from India's infrastructure growth and focuses on localization, contributing to strong financial performance. The article highlights its market position, growth opportunities, competitive landscape, and considerations for North American investors, while also outlining potential risks.

feed.title: Conagra Brands (CAG) Maintains Hold Rating as Stifel Lowers Pric
feed.summary: Stifel analyst Matthew Smith maintained a Hold rating on Conagra Brands (CAG) but lowered the price target from $19.00 to $17.00, reflecting a 10.53% decrease. This adjustment follows several other downgrades and price target reductions from various analysts in recent months. Despite these changes, the average target price from 16 analysts is $17.91, implying a 16.27% upside from the current price, with the consensus recommendation remaining "Hold."

feed.title: Five Below and International Paper have been highlighted as Zacks Bull and Bear of the Day
feed.summary: Zacks Equity Research has identified Five Below (FIVE) as the Bull of the Day and International Paper (IP) as the Bear of the Day. Five Below is praised for its strong business model attracting budget-conscious consumers and its significant store growth potential, leading to optimistic earnings estimates. Conversely, International Paper faces challenges due to cyclical demand weakness, restructuring costs, and plant closures, prompting analysts to cut earnings forecasts. The article also highlights Micron Technology (MU) and Lam Research (LRCX) as "Strong Buy" AI stocks.

feed.title: Kroger (NYSE: KR) director granted deferred phantom stock units
feed.summary: Kroger Director Elaine L. Chao received a grant of 387.9693 phantom stock units as part of a deferred compensation plan, with each unit valued at $67.66. These phantom units, which represent the right to receive cash equivalent to one Kroger common share, will be paid out upon the termination of her service as an Independent Director. After this transaction, Chao holds 6060.5913 phantom stock units and 4083.5120 Kroger common shares directly.

feed.title: Fox Corp. (Class A) Stock: Navigating Media Landscape Shifts and Investor Opportunities in 2026
feed.summary: This article analyzes Fox Corp. (Class A) stock, highlighting its business model centered on cable networks and broadcast television with a strong focus on live sports and news. It details the company's competitive advantages in a consolidating media industry, such as its dominance in live content and its profitable ad-supported streaming service, Tubi. The article also discusses growth catalysts, risks including cord-cutting and regulatory scrutiny, and its relevance for North American investors seeking exposure to U.S. media consumption habits.

feed.title: RGC Resources (RGCO) senior VP adds common shares via dividend plan
feed.summary: RGC Resources Inc.'s Senior VP and Secretary, Lawrence T. Oliver, purchased 9.238 shares of common stock at $21.65 per share through the company’s Dividend Reinvestment and Stock Purchase Plan. This transaction increases his direct holdings to 29,786.472 shares. The purchase, detailed in a Form 4 SEC filing, was an open-market acquisition.

feed.title: Medtech giant Stryker says it’s back up after Iranian cyberattack
feed.summary: Medtech company Stryker has announced it is fully operational again, three weeks after an Iranian cyberattack by the Handala group. The attack on March 11 impacted order processing, manufacturing, and shipping, but production is now rapidly returning to peak capacity. Stryker is continuing its investigation and recovery efforts with cybersecurity experts and government agencies, maintaining that patient care remains its top priority.

feed.title: Humana (NYSE: HUM) president updates phantom units, options and RSUs
feed.summary: Humana Inc.'s President of Insurance, George Renaudin II, reported routine compensation-related activities including an annual contribution of 25 Phantom Stock Units. His holdings now include 199 indirect Phantom Stock Units, 16,075 direct common shares, 542 indirect common shares, stock options for 4,162 shares expiring in 2030, options for 6,966 shares expiring in 2031, and 9,059 restricted stock units. This Form 4 filing details these compensation structures and does not indicate open-market buying or selling.

feed.title: Baillie Gifford (NASDAQ: TTD) holds 150,381 Class A shares
feed.summary: Baillie Gifford & Co has reported beneficial ownership of 150,381 Class A common shares in The Trade Desk, Inc. (NASDAQ: TTD) through an amended Schedule 13G/A filing. This represents 0.03% of the class, with 130,006 shares subject to sole voting power. The filing, dated April 2, 2026, is a routine passive ownership disclosure and does not indicate any purchase or sale activity.

feed.title: QVC Group anticipates going concern warning
feed.summary: QVC Group, owner of QVC and HSN, is late in filing its annual report and expects to disclose substantial doubt about its ability to continue as a going concern. The delay is due to ongoing negotiations with lenders and a review by its accounting firm. The company, which launched a turnaround strategy in late 2024 involving job cuts, recently received low credit ratings from Fitch and Moody's, indicating significant credit risk.

feed.title: The Tim Hortons parent just made Josh Brown's best stocks list and is breaking out
feed.summary: Restaurant Brands International (QSR), the parent company of Tim Hortons, Burger King, Popeye's, and Firehouse Subs, has been added to Josh Brown's "Best Stocks in the Market" list. The article highlights QSR's strong technical setup and fundamental story, particularly emphasizing the strategic leadership of Joshua Kobza and Executive Chairman Patrick Doyle, known for his successful turnaround at Domino's Pizza. The company is poised for a breakout, with goals for significant global expansion and improved franchisee profitability.

feed.title: Insider Selling: Southern (NYSE:SO) CEO Sells 25,000 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: Southern Company CEO Kimberly Greene sold 25,000 shares of the company's stock on March 30th for approximately $2.42 million, reducing her stake by nearly 20%. The sale occurred when Southern's stock was trading near $97.63, with a market capitalization of $107.5 billion. Analysts currently rate Southern as a "Hold" with a consensus price target of $98.08, despite the company recently missing EPS estimates but increasing revenue and maintaining a 3.0% dividend yield.

feed.title: Delta Air Lines plans Delta One Lounge at Minneapolis-St. Paul airport
feed.summary: Delta Air Lines is planning to open a new Delta One Lounge at Minneapolis-St. Paul International Airport. This will be an exclusive lounge experience, similar to the one recently opened at New York’s John F. Kennedy International Airport, and will be located near an existing Delta Sky Club.

feed.title: Costco confirms opening date for long-awaited New Braunfels shop
feed.summary: The highly anticipated $37 million Costco warehouse in New Braunfels, Texas, has set its official opening date for May 15. The warehouse, which includes a 32-pump fuel station, will anchor the sprawling Mayfair development and is expected to draw shoppers from across the Texas Hill Country. Construction is nearing completion, and the project received nearly $8 million in tax incentives from the New Braunfels City Council.

feed.title: ConocoPhillips (NYSE:COP) CEO Sells $15,025,558.91 in Stock
feed.summary: ConocoPhillips CEO Ryan Michael Lance sold 113,221 shares of the company's stock for $15,025,558.91 on March 31st, reducing his stake by 24.44%. This follows an earlier sale of 506,800 shares on March 20th for approximately $64.5 million, indicating significant insider selling activities. The company recently missed quarterly earnings estimates but maintains a market capitalization of $158.7 billion and pays a quarterly dividend of $0.84.

feed.title: Keysight launches virtual assembly simulation software
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies (NYSE:KEYS) has released "Keysight Assembly," a new virtual process simulation software aimed at helping manufacturers identify and resolve assembly issues early in the development phase. This software allows engineers to simulate shop-floor processes without requiring specialized finite element modeling skills, thus reducing costs associated with late-stage failures. The solution integrates with existing stamping simulation software, providing a comprehensive workflow from part forming to assembly validation.

feed.title: SEA (NYSE:SE) COO Gang Ye Sells 10,000 Shares
feed.summary: Gang Ye, COO of SEA (NYSE:SE), sold 10,000 shares on April 1st for $842,800, reducing his stake by 2.38% to 410,000 shares. This follows four other 10,000-share sales in March. The stock was trading at $81.86, with Sea reporting Q4 EPS of $0.63, missing estimates, and revenue growth of 38.4% to $6.85 billion.

feed.title: SEA (NYSE:SE) Insider Yanjun Wang Sells 800 Shares of Stock
feed.summary: SEA (NYSE:SE) insider Yanjun Wang recently sold 800 shares of the company's stock for $82.66 per share, totaling $66,128. This sale was part of a series of transactions in late March and early April, resulting in a 2.67% reduction of his holdings. Despite missing EPS expectations, Sea Limited reported strong revenue growth, and analysts maintain a "Moderate Buy" rating with a target price of $166.83.

feed.title: Jingye Chen Sells 800 Shares of SEA (NYSE:SE) Stock
feed.summary: Jingye Chen, an insider at Sea Limited (NYSE:SE), sold 800 shares of the company's stock on April 1st at an average price of $82.66, reducing his stake by 0.34%. This is the fourth such 800-share sale recently, with previous transactions occurring in March. Despite missing EPS estimates in its last quarterly report, Sea Limited exceeded revenue expectations, and analysts currently have a "Moderate Buy" rating with a consensus price target of $166.83 for the stock.

feed.title: 5 Top ETFs of the Best-Performing Sector of March
feed.summary: The energy sector was the best-performing sector in March, driven by a sharp rise in oil prices due to tightening supply conditions and increased demand. This article highlights the five best-performing energy ETFs: iShares U.S. Oil Equipment & Services ETF (IEZ), iShares U.S. Oil & Gas Exploration & Production ETF (IEO), Texas Capital Texas Oil Index ETF (OILT), Invesco Energy Exploration & Production ETF (PXE), and VanEck Vectors Oil Services ETF (OIH). These ETFs gained between 11.9% and 12.8% last month, outperforming the broader market.

feed.title: Roivant Shrugs Off Batoclimab Phase III Failure in TED
feed.summary: Roivant Sciences is reportedly unconcerned about the failure of its Batoclimab Phase III trial for Thyroid Eye Disease (TED). This follows a previous announcement where a trial of Batoclimab was positive, but no filing was planned. The company's recent focus has been on tightening leadership control over Immunovant and narrowing the focus of IMVT-1402.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Lowers Price Target for Redwood Trust (RWT) to $6
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has maintained its "Neutral" rating for Redwood Trust (RWT) but decreased its price target from $6.50 to $6, representing a 7.69% reduction. This adjustment comes amidst varying analyst sentiments and price target changes for RWT by other firms. Despite the lowered target, the average analyst price target suggests a potential upside of 26.85% from the current price, and GuruFocus estimates a fair value (GF Value) indicating a 53.73% upside.

feed.title: RGC Resources (RGCO) director receives 122.864-share stock award
feed.summary: RGC Resources Inc. director Thomas J. Crawford received a stock award of 122.864 shares of Common Stock at $21.65 per share under the company's Restricted Stock Plan for Outside Directors. Following this transaction, Crawford directly holds 14,218.774 shares. This award is classified as a grant and not an open-market purchase, and is detailed in a recent Form 4 filing.

feed.title: Jonathan Allison (ROOT) files Form 144 reporting several March 2026 Class A sales
feed.summary: Jonathan A. Allison has filed multiple Form 144 notices for proposed sales of Root, Inc. (ROOT) Class A shares throughout March 2026, totaling several dispositions with reported gross proceeds. The filings also record a restricted stock vesting event on February 19, 2026, where 4,112 Class A shares were listed as compensation. This information provides transparency on insider share transactions and holdings for investors.

feed.title: RGR: Lake Street Hosts Virtual Meeting for Investors
feed.summary: Sturm, Ruger & Company (RGR) is scheduled to host a virtual meeting with Lake Street on April 7, 2026, to discuss its strategic direction and financial health. The company, primarily a firearms manufacturer, shows strong balance sheet liquidity and conservative financial management despite recent challenges in profitability. While institutional ownership is significant, the article highlights a notable enterprise value to EBITDA ratio, suggesting potential overvaluation.

feed.title: PNC Declares Dividend of $1.70 on Common Stock
feed.summary: The PNC Financial Services Group, Inc. (NYSE: PNC) has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $1.70 per share on its common stock, payable on May 5, 2026, to shareholders of record as of April 14, 2026. The board also declared cash dividends on several series of preferred stocks, with varying payment and record dates in May and June 2026. PNC is a large diversified financial services institution in the United States.

feed.title: PNC shareholders get $1.70 a share May 5 in quarterly dividend
feed.summary: PNC Financial Services Group (NYSE: PNC) has declared a quarterly common stock dividend of $1.70 per share, payable on May 5, 2026, to shareholders recorded by April 14, 2026. The company also announced cash dividends for several series of preferred stocks with various payment and record dates in 2026. If a payment date falls on a non-business day, the dividend will be paid on the next business day.
